---
title: "Weekly Progress Report"
author: "Your Name"
date: "2026-03-25 to 2026-04-01"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=2.5cm
# 中文用户加上：
# lang: zh
# CJKmainfont: "Noto Sans CJK SC"
---

## Summary

This week I validated the mixup direction on CIFAR-10, collected evidence from code and result artifacts, and narrowed down the next experiment choices.

## Progress

### Experiment A

Tested mixup on CIFAR-10 after last week's meeting. Accuracy improved from 78.3% to 81.7%. Evidence includes commit `abc1234` and `results/example.png`.

<!-- 插入结果图：-->
<!-- ![实验结果](results/example.png){width=80%} -->

### Reading and Discussion

Read the CutMix paper, summarized three follow-up ideas, and discussed the detection-task extension with a senior labmate.

## Questions for Advisor

- Which follow-up direction should go first: adaptive mixup, contrastive learning, or detection?
- Should we request extra GPU time for the ImageNet run?

## Blockers

- The GPU queue is long, so the ImageNet experiment may be delayed by about a week.

## Next Steps

- Validate the result on an ImageNet subset.
- Start drafting the related-work section.
